case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CAROLINA L BRINKMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 17156058) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
